commits: 5f7824e - bober(sprint-1): add Anthropic prompt caching behind default-on flag

filesChanged.description: promptCaching field + optional opts 2nd ctor arg (default true); buildCachedSystem() + attachMessageBreakpoints() helpers; chat() branches on this.promptCaching (enabled: TextBlockParam[] system + system-and-last-3 breakpoints capped at 4; disabled: byte-identical plain-string path).
anthropic case resolves promptCaching from providerConfig (typeof===boolean, default true) and forwards { promptCaching } to AnthropicAdapter.
7 tests (C1, C1-default, C2, C2-edge, C3, C3-multi, response-normalization) via top-level vi.mock('@anthropic-ai/sdk').

notes: Only test failures in full run are 2 flaky timeout-style baseline failures (37-tool-count tests); disk approval-poll passed this run. cache_control isolated to anthropic.ts(+test); other adapters byte-unchanged. C4 coverage relied on existing factory instanceof tests + the C1-default adapter test, NOT a new dedicated factory test asserting providerConfig.promptCaching:false is honored end-to-end.
